title: ‘Your Appearance At National Assembly, A Show of Shame’- PTD Blasts Afolabi-NUPENG General Secretary - FinancialEDGE
description: The Petroleum Tanker Drivers (PTD) under the aegis of "Concerned Elders League" has on Monday, October 20, 2025 decried the recent indecent and embarrassing public misconduct of the NUPENG General Secretary, Afolabi Olawale at the National Assembly, calling it "a show of shame" . PTD also alleged that Afolabi is the architect of all
